tech_stack.frontend: React 18, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, Tailwind CSS, Vite

current_mission.title: Phase 1: Design Foundation Implementation
current_mission.description: Implement design tokens, Tailwind configuration, and base styles for X/Twitter-inspired dark theme with Dumu Waks orange branding
deliverables: Updated tailwind.config.js with X-inspired dark theme colors and design tokens
Design tokens CSS file with all color, typography, spacing, and effect variables
Updated index.css with dark-first base styles
Inter font integration via Google Fonts
Utility class extensions for glassmorphism effects
acceptance_criteria: All design tokens from DESIGN_SYSTEM_ARCHITECTURE.md implemented
Dark theme is default (no toggle needed)
No visual regressions on existing components

tasks.title: Configure Tailwind with X-inspired color palette
tasks.description: Update tailwind.config.js with dark theme colors, orange accent, and extend theme with design tokens

tasks.title: Create design tokens CSS file
tasks.description: Create src/styles/tokens.css with all CSS custom properties for colors, typography, spacing, borders, shadows, and animations

tasks.title: Update global styles with dark-first approach
tasks.description: Update index.css to use pure black background, X text colors, and remove light/dark toggle logic

tasks.title: Add Inter font via Google Fonts
tasks.description: Add Inter font to index.html and configure in Tailwind

tasks.title: Create glassmorphism utility classes
tasks.description: Add backdrop-blur utilities and glass effect variants in Tailwind config and CSS

tasks.title: Add accessibility utilities
tasks.description: Add screen reader only class, reduced motion support, and focus indicator styles
